Osasuna decides to challenge Thursday's match against Barça - Mundo Deportivo After a morning of meetings to assess the possibilities, Osasuna opted to challenge the result of the postponed 3-0 match against Barça, played on March 27 at Montjuïc, due to an alleged improper selection of Iñigo Martínez.

arts.ttl: Barcelona come under fire as official statement accuses club of breaking FIFA rules
arts.sum: Barcelona's rivals Osasuna have issued a statement explaining their position after accusing the Catalan club of breaking FIFA rules with their team selection in Thursday's meeting

arts.ttl: Dani Olmo injury: The games Barcelona playmaker is set to miss
arts.sum: Dani Olmo is one of Barcelona's most valuable assets but looks set for an unforeseen spell on the sidelines at just the wrong time.

arts.sum: Barcelona attacker Dani Olmo will be sidelined for approximately three weeks with the right adductor injury that he suffered against Osasuna.

arts.ttl: Ex-Barca defender Alves has rape conviction quashed
arts.sum: Former Barcelona and Brazil defender Dani Alves has a sexual assault conviction overturned on appeal by a Spanish court.

arts.ttl: Osasuna launch appeal over Inigo Martinez 'ineligibility' and Barcelona have questions to answer amid fears of points deduction
arts.sum: Osasuna launch an official appeal to the Spanish Football Federation, claiming that Inigo Martinez was not eligible to take to the field for Barcelona on Thursday.
